languages.text: "Любопытная манера уходить от неудобных вопросов. За статусами и регалиями обычно прячутся самые отъявленные мздоимцы, которым есть, что скрывать. Артизан, вы явно недоговариваете". {n}Провокация звучит из уст Соломона совершенно буднично.{/n}

"An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Любопытная манера уходить от неудобных вопросов. За статусами и регалиями обычно прячутся самые отъявленные мздоимцы, которым есть, что скрывать. Артизан, вы явно недоговариваете". {n}Провокация звучит из уст Соломона совершенно буднично.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

"An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

"An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

languages.text: 「不快な質問を巧みにかわす方法ですね。最も有名な賄賂を受け取った人物は、自分の地位と装束の後ろに隠れて、いつも何か隠しているのです。職人、あなたは明らかに嘘をついています。」{n}ソロモーンは、乾いた事実を述べるような口調で挑発する.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「不快な質問を巧みにかわす方法ですね。最も有名な賄賂を受け取った人物は、自分の地位と装束の後ろに隠れて、いつも何か隠しているのです。職人、あなたは明らかに嘘をついています。」{n}ソロモーンは、乾いた事実を述べるような口調で挑発する.{/n}

languages.text: “这回避尖锐问题的手段倒有意思。那些最臭名昭著的受贿者，往往喜欢缩在头衔与长袍后面——而他们总有见不得人的秘密。匠人，你显然没有说实话。”{n}索罗蒙用干瘪、不带感情的口吻抛出了这番挑衅。{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这回避尖锐问题的手段倒有意思。那些最臭名昭著的受贿者，往往喜欢缩在头衔与长袍后面——而他们总有见不得人的秘密。匠人，你显然没有说实话。”{n}索罗蒙用干瘪、不带感情的口吻抛出了这番挑衅。{/n}

languages.text: «Una forma interesante de evitar preguntas incómodas. Los corruptos de mayor estatus tienden a esconderse detrás de su posición y su riqueza, y siempre tienen algo que ocultar. Artesano, es evidente que no dice la verdad». {n}Solomorne pronuncia su provocación en un tono seco y objetivo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Una forma interesante de evitar preguntas incómodas. Los corruptos de mayor estatus tienden a esconderse detrás de su posición y su riqueza, y siempre tienen algo que ocultar. Artesano, es evidente que no dice la verdad». {n}Solomorne pronuncia su provocación en un tono seco y objetivo.{/n}

languages.text: "Eine interessante Art, lästigen Fragen auszuweichen. Die berüchtigtsten Schmiergeldempfänger verstecken sich oft hinter ihrem Status ... und haben stets etwas zu verbergen. Artifex, Ihr sagt eindeutig nicht die Wahrheit." {n}Solomorne spricht diese Provokation mit gelassener Sachlichkeit aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eine interessante Art, lästigen Fragen auszuweichen. Die berüchtigtsten Schmiergeldempfänger verstecken sich oft hinter ihrem Status ... und haben stets etwas zu verbergen. Artifex, Ihr sagt eindeutig nicht die Wahrheit." {n}Solomorne spricht diese Provokation mit gelassener Sachlichkeit aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Une manière intéressante d'éluder les questions gênantes. Les individus les plus enclins à se laisser acheter se terrent bien souvent derrière leur statut et leurs atours, et ils ont toujours quelque chose à cacher. Artisan, il est clair que vous ne dites pas la vérité, » {n}déclare Solomorne sur un ton sec et factuel.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Une manière intéressante d'éluder les questions gênantes. Les individus les plus enclins à se laisser acheter se terrent bien souvent derrière leur statut et leurs atours, et ils ont toujours quelque chose à cacher. Artisan, il est clair que vous ne dites pas la vérité, » {n}déclare Solomorne sur un ton sec et factuel.{/n}

languages.text: "Garip sorulardan kaçınmanın ilginç bir yolu. Kötü şöhretli rüşvetçiler genellikle statülerinin ve işaretlerinin arkasına saklanırlar. Her zaman saklayacak bir şeyleri vardır. Zanaatkâr, doğruyu söylemiyorsun." {n}Solomorne, bu provokasyonu kuru, soğuk bir tonda yapıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An interesting way of evading awkward questions. The most notorious bribe-takers often cower behind their status and regalia — and they always have something to hide. Artisan, you are clearly not telling the truth." {n}Solomorne delivers this provocation in a dry, matter-of-fact tone.{/n}
